subject: Increase initialDelay Timings for dr-db
commit_message:
Increase initialDelay Timings for dr-db

Change-Id: I094a5372e072a907c06e69de46ee1ef083799467
Issue-ID: DMAAP-964
Signed-off-by: econwar <conor.ward@est.tech>

entries.message:

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

Don't worry about the cloud*.yaml - we can do that in a separate jira if it slows down getting a test env - just post results for this one and we are good
